title: MovementIntensityCalculatorPayload
description: Schema for the Movement Intensity & Load Calculator shim. Defines the input signals (steps, heart rate, movement history) and the resulting intensity, calorie burn, and recovery guidance outputs used by SSA planning and SessionRunner-powered movement sessions.

nodeId.description: Identifier of this calculator node in the Planning Graph.

calculationVersion.description: Semantic version of the movement intensity calculation logic.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the calculation was performed.

source.description: Optional description of where the input was sourced from (e.g., 'manual', 'wearable-sync', 'session-history').

input.description: All inputs required to compute movement intensity, load, and calorie-related outputs.

unitSystem.description: Measurement system used for body weight and distances.

bodyWeight.description: Body weight in pounds (imperial) or kilograms (metric), used to approximate energy cost of movement.

age.description: Age in years, used to estimate max heart rate and risk flags.

sex.description: Optional sex marker used for some heart-rate and intensity heuristics.

restingHeartRate.description: Average resting heart rate in beats per minute.

maxHeartRateEstimate.description: Optional measured or estimated maximum heart rate (bpm). If omitted, calculator may estimate from age.

baselineStepGoalPerDay.description: Configured daily step goal used as a reference for intensity scoring.

preferredSessionBlockMinutes.description: Typical movement block length the user prefers (e.g., 20-minute walk, 30-minute class).

maxSessionsPerDay.description: Maximum number of planned sessions per day before marking overload risk.

indoorOnly.description: If true, prefer indoor movement sessions (useful when weather guard is blocking outdoor sessions).

stepHistory.description: Recent step and movement metrics by day, used to compute current movement load and trend.

steps.description: Total steps recorded for the day.

distance.description: Approximate distance covered that day (miles or kilometers, depending on unitSystem).

activeMinutesLight.description: Minutes of light activity (easy walking, light chores).

activeMinutesModerate.description: Minutes of moderate activity (brisk walking, moderate chores, light cardio).

activeMinutesVigorous.description: Minutes of vigorous activity (running, intense cardio, heavy labor).

avgHeartRate.description: Average heart rate for the day (bpm), if available.

sessionHistory.description: History of structured movement sessions (walks, workouts, chores-as-sessions) used to derive load and recovery needs.

id.description: Unique identifier of the session, often matching an SSA SessionRunner session id.

domain.description: Domain the session belongs to; movement intensity primarily uses 'movement' but may factor in physical load from other domains.

label.description: Human-readable label for the session (e.g., 'Evening Walk', 'Yard Work', 'Leg Day').

durationMinutes.description: Total duration of the session in minutes.

intensityTag.description: Approximate intensity tag either from user, wearable, or prior calculation.

avgHeartRate.description: Average heart rate during the session, if available.

caloriesEstimated.description: Estimated calories burned in this session, if available from a device.

healthRiskFlags.description: High-level health risk flags that may adjust intensity recommendations and targets.

cardioRisk.description: If true, suggest more conservative intensity progression and more frequent rest checks.

jointPainRisk.description: If true, favor lower-impact movement templates (walking, water-based movement, gentle strength).

fatigueRisk.description: If true, adjust overall weekly targets downward and emphasize recovery.

sleepQualityFlags.description: Flags describing sleep quality, used to tune recovery and intensity recommendations.

sleepDebtHigh.description: If true, user is carrying significant sleep debt.

sleepFragmented.description: If true, recent sleep has been fragmented or low quality.

restedFeeling.description: If true, user reports feeling generally rested.

output.description: Calculated movement intensity, calorie burn estimates, zone breakdowns, and recovery flags.

movementIntensityScore.description: Composite movement intensity/load score (0–100) computed from steps, heart rate, and session history.

movementIntensityCategory.description: Human-friendly intensity category derived from the score and guidelines.

movementMinutesTargets.description: Recommended weekly movement targets in minutes, aligned with guidelines and user risk flags.

lightMinutesPerWeek.description: Recommended weekly minutes of light activity.

moderateMinutesPerWeek.description: Recommended weekly minutes of moderate activity.

vigorousMinutesPerWeek.description: Recommended weekly minutes of vigorous activity.

combinedGuidelineEquivalentMinutesPerWee.description: Converted guideline-equivalent minutes (e.g., vigorous minutes counted as 2x) to compare against standard recommendations.

deficitToGuidelineMinutes.description: Positive value if user is below guideline-equivalent minutes, negative if above.

movementZoneBreakdown.description: Breakdown of time spent in heart-rate or effort zones used for planning intensity mixing.

zoneModel.description: Model used to define zones (heart-rate reserve, percent max HR, or RPE).

weeklyMinutesByZone.description: Weekly minutes spent in each zone.

calorieAndLoadEstimates.description: Estimated energy expenditure and training load metrics for planning and recovery.

estimatedDailyActivityCalories.description: Average daily calories burned from non-rest activity based on recent step and session history.

estimatedWeeklyActivityCalories.description: Total estimated activity calories burned in the recent 7-day period.

nonExerciseActivityCaloriesPerDay.description: Estimated calories from non-exercise activity (NEAT) such as housework, walking around the home, etc.

trainingLoadScore7d.description: Aggregate 7-day training load score calculated from intensity and duration of sessions.

trainingLoadTrend.description: Trend of training load relative to previous weeks.

recoveryLoadFlags.description: Flags indicating whether the current load suggests more rest or more movement.

overreachingRisk.description: True if recent load is high relative to history and sleep/health risk flags.

undertrainingRisk.description: True if movement is far below guideline-equivalent minutes for multiple weeks.

recoveryDayRecommended.description: True if a dedicated low-intensity or rest day is recommended.

notes.description: Short human-readable explanation of the current recovery/load status.

movementSessionTemplates.description: Pre-built session templates (suitable for SessionRunner) reflecting the recommended intensity mix for the coming week.

templateId.description: Unique identifier for this movement session template.

title.description: Human-readable title for the session (e.g., '20-min Easy Walk', '30-min Mixed Zones').

recommendedPerWeek.description: Suggested number of times per week to run this session.

durationMinutes.description: Estimated duration of the session in minutes.

domain.description: Domain of the resulting SessionRunner session (movement).

source.description: Source metadata for this template, compatible with Session object contracts.

refId.description: Optional reference to a plan or external source.
